title: Electronic protocol files for the automated in-solution hybridization capture on a Bravo NGS Workstation (Agilent Technologies)
author: Zavala, Elena
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Here we have provided the electronic protocol files (vzp files) for import into VWorks (tested with version 13.1), instructions on how to perform the import (word document), the full automated protocol, and a list of all necessary files.
steps_raw: Here we have provided the electronic protocol files (vzp files) for import into VWorks (tested with version 13.1), instructions on how to perform the import (word document), the full automated protocol, and a list of all necessary files.
